data.description:

EQ Resources Limited ( (AU:EQR) ) has issued an announcement.

UBS Group AG and its related bodies corporate have disclosed that they ceased to be a substantial shareholder in EQ Resources Limited as of 13 April 2026. The change, formalised in a substantial holder notice lodged on 15 April 2026, indicates that UBS’s voting power in the company has fallen below the substantial holding threshold, potentially altering EQ Resources’ institutional investor base and the balance of influence among its major shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:EQR) stock is a Buy with a A$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EQ Resources Limited stock, see the AU:EQR Stock Forecast page.

More about EQ Resources Limited

EQ Resources Limited operates in the resources sector, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral assets. The company is listed on the Australian market and its shares are actively traded, making changes in substantial shareholdings relevant to investors and corporate governance watchers.

data.title: CRH Continues U.S. Share Buyback Under $300 Million Programme
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CRH plc ( (CRH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

CRH plc has continued its share buyback activity in the U.S. market, repurchasing and redeeming 100 ordinary shares on 14 April 2026 through Wells Fargo Securities at a volume-weighted average price of about $118 per share. The redeemed shares will be cancelled, reducing the number of ordinary shares in issue to 668,200,612 while the company also retains 35,634,977 shares in treasury, which carry no voting rights.

The transactions are part of CRH’s previously announced program to repurchase up to $300 million of its ordinary shares by 28 April 2026, underscoring an ongoing capital return strategy to shareholders. By shrinking its free-float and increasing the proportion of treasury and cancelled shares, CRH is tightening its share base, a move that can support earnings per share metrics and signal management’s confidence in the company’s valuation.

More about CRH plc

CRH plc is a global building materials group supplying cement, aggregates, ready-mixed concrete, asphalt and related construction products and services. The company serves infrastructure, residential and commercial construction markets, with its shares traded in the U.S. and Europe, and is a constituent of major construction and materials indices.

Learn more about CRH stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pryme Calls Extraordinary Meeting to Vote on Euronext Growth Oslo Delisting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pryme B.V. ( (DE:8XG0) ) has shared an update.

Pryme N.V. has called an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders for 4 May 2026 at its Rotterdam offices, following a request from four major shareholders who jointly hold about 88.3% of the company’s share capital. The key agenda item is a proposed resolution that Pryme apply for the delisting of its shares from Euronext Growth Oslo, a move that could significantly reshape its capital markets presence and alter liquidity and access for existing investors.

If approved, the proposed delisting would mark a strategic shift in how Pryme engages with public markets and could signal a change in financing strategy or listing venue preference. The initiative, driven by a dominant shareholder bloc, underscores strong internal support for reconsidering Pryme’s trading location and may have important implications for corporate governance and the company’s future investor base.

More about Pryme B.V.

Pryme N.V. is a Netherlands-based company operating from Botlek Rotterdam, with its shares traded on Euronext Growth Oslo. The company is active in the cleantech sector, focusing on sustainable industrial solutions, and maintains a significant shareholder base, including a group that collectively controls more than four-fifths of its share capital.

Average Trading Volume: 7,874

Current Market Cap: NOK236.4M

data.title: Southern Cross Gold Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Nagambie Resources
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nagambie Resources Limited ( (AU:NAG) ) has provided an update.

Southern Cross Gold Pty Ltd has notified Nagambie Resources Limited that it has ceased to be a substantial shareholder in the company. The change occurred between 4 December 2025 and 10 April 2026 and resulted solely from dilution of Southern Cross Gold’s stake following new share issues by Nagambie, reducing its holding by 53,361,046 fully paid ordinary shares and the same number of votes.

The notice confirms there were no changes in associations linked to Southern Cross Gold’s interest, indicating that the reduction was mechanical rather than driven by disposals or new agreements. For existing shareholders, the filing clarifies that Nagambie’s capital raisings or share issues have materially altered the ownership structure, with a former substantial holder now falling below the disclosure threshold.

More about Nagambie Resources Limited

Nagambie Resources Limited is an Australian company listed on the ASX that is involved in mineral exploration and related resource development activities. Its shareholder base includes institutional and corporate investors whose holdings are subject to substantial holder disclosure requirements under Australian corporations law.

YTD Price Performance: 9.09%

Average Trading Volume: 4,115,359

data.title: KDDI Deepens Investment in Thai Data Center Arm with Major Capital Increase
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from KDDI ( (JP:9433) ).

KDDI will inject 2,432 million baht into its consolidated unit TELEHOUSE (Thailand) Ltd., significantly raising the subsidiary’s capital to 3,132 million baht and boosting KDDI’s stake to 87.7 percent. The move will make the Thai data center operator a specified subsidiary, as its capital will exceed 10 percent of KDDI’s own share capital under Japanese regulations.

The capital increase is intended to fund land acquisition and expansion of TELEHOUSE’s data center capacity in Thailand, where demand is rising on the back of generative AI, cloud computing, and government-led digitalization. While the Thai arm is still loss-making as it scales up, KDDI expects only a minimal impact on consolidated earnings in the year to March 2027, underscoring that this is a longer-term strategic bet on regional data center growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9433) stock is a Buy with a Yen2800.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on KDDI stock, see the JP:9433 Stock Forecast page.

More about KDDI

KDDI Corporation is a major Japanese telecommunications group offering mobile, fixed-line, and ICT services, with a growing focus on data centers and cloud-related infrastructure. Through its TELEHOUSE brand, KDDI operates data centers globally, targeting enterprise and hyperscale customers as digitalization and cloud adoption accelerate across Asia and other key markets.

Average Trading Volume: 10,140,848

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen9910.4B

ABx Group Limited ( (AU:ABX) ) has shared an update.

ABx Group Limited has disclosed the top 20 holders of its UO6 unlisted options, which expire on 17 November 2027 at an exercise price of $0.10, as at 14 April 2026. The largest holders include Orca Capital GmbH, Palisades Investments Ltd, Vidog Capital Pty Ltd, and several major nominee and custody entities, indicating significant institutional and professional investor interest.

These top 20 investors collectively control 70,964,873 UO6 options, representing 68.85% of this class on issue, with the remaining 31.15% spread among other holders. The concentrated ownership among key financial and family investment vehicles suggests that strategic and sophisticated investors have substantial exposure to ABx Group’s future equity potential via these long-dated options.

More about ABx Group Limited

ABx Group Limited operates in the resources sector and has issued a class of unlisted options designated UO6, exercisable at $0.10 and expiring on 17 November 2027. data.title: Net Insight sets April 29 date for Q1 2026 report and investor webcast
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Net Insight AB Class B ( ($SE:NETI.B) ) has issued an announcement.

Net Insight AB will publish its interim report for the first quarter of 2026 on April 29 at 7:30 a.m. CEST and will host a live web conference the same day at 9:00 a.m. CEST, where CEO Andreas Eriksson and CFO Cecilia Höjgård Höök will present and comment on the results. The presentation, held in English and accessible via online registration, underscores the company’s ongoing engagement with investors and stakeholders as it updates the market on its operational and financial performance.

The webcast will be available on demand on Net Insight’s website, allowing broader access for analysts and global media-industry participants who follow the company’s role in video transport and media cloud markets. By maintaining transparent quarterly communications, Net Insight reinforces its positioning as a key infrastructure partner to major media and telecom customers worldwide, which may influence investor sentiment and industry perception ahead of the 2026 reporting cycle.

More about Net Insight AB Class B

Net Insight AB is a Swedish provider of high-performance video transport and media cloud technology for content providers, broadcasters, production companies and service providers. Its Emmy Award-winning Nimbra platform underpins live contribution, distribution and remote production workflows over managed and unmanaged IP networks and major cloud platforms, and the company also offers Zyntai time synchronization solutions for 5G and other critical networks.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ABx Group Limited ( (AU:ABX) ) has provided an announcement.

ABx Group Limited has released a transaction-specific prospectus for an offer of 1,000 Cleansing Options at no issue price, primarily to remove trading restrictions on existing options of the same class. Application will be made for ASX quotation of these speculative Cleansing Options, with the offer closing on 17 April 2026 and no options to be issued later than 13 months after the prospectus date.

The document, prepared under section 713 of the Corporations Act, focuses on the effect of the option issue and the rights attaching to the securities rather than providing full financial disclosure. The company stresses that the offer is only available in Australia, is of a speculative nature, and that investors should read the prospectus in full and seek professional advice to assess suitability given their individual risk profiles and financial circumstances.

More about ABx Group Limited

ABx Group Limited is an Australian listed company that issues and trades securities on the ASX. The company is a disclosing entity under the Corporations Act and provides enhanced disclosure to the market through continuously quoted securities and related option issues.

data.title: Kokuyo Completes Treasury Share Disposal for Restricted Stock Compensation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kokuyo Co ( (JP:7984) ) has provided an announcement.

Kokuyo Co., Ltd. has completed the pay-in procedure for the disposal of treasury shares to deliver restricted stock compensation to its management. The move follows a March 31, 2026 board approval, aligning executive incentives more closely with shareholder interests and reinforcing the company’s governance and compensation framework.

The disposal covers 77,008 shares of common stock at 835.9 yen per share, for a total value of 64,370,980 yen. The allotted shares are distributed among seven directors, two corporate officers who are also directors, and ten managing officers, further tying senior leadership’s compensation to Kokuyo’s long-term performance.

More about Kokuyo Co

Kokuyo Co., Ltd., listed on the TSE Prime with stock code 7984, operates in the office and stationery products industry. The company provides office furniture, stationery, and related services, serving corporate and individual customers in Japan and overseas as part of the broader office supplies and workplace solutions market.
